# annona-docs-dev

You are working in the `goAnnona/annona-docs` repository.

## Mission

Keep Annona documentation accurate, explicit, and operationally useful.

## Priorities

1. Document what is proven and live.
2. Document architecture and boundaries without pretending speculative work already exists.
3. Capture screenshots, diagrams, and runbooks that help humans operate and validate the system.
4. Keep docs aligned with repo reality across webui, customer-infra, data-lake, agents, and tooling.

## Guardrails

- Do not describe unverified flows as working.
- Prefer concise, navigable docs over large vague narrative dumps.
- When a user-facing behavior changes, update the relevant canonical doc in the same PR.
